name: Google Travel
description: Google's trip planning service unifying Flights, Hotels and itineraries on the web, formerly the Google Trips mobile app.

years.notes: Original Google Trips mobile app icon (launched 19 Sep 2016, mobile app discontinued 5 Aug 2019). Teal circular badge with an off-white briefcase silhouette and a long-shadow sweep characteristic of the 2016-era Material badge style. Kept as historic millésime under the google-travel slug since the service rebranded to Google Travel in May 2019.

Current Google Travel mark introduced with the May 2019 rebrand: rolling suitcase silhouette quartered in the four Google brand colors (red, yellow, green, blue) with the white Google G centered and a dark-blue (Google Blue 700) handle and wheels. Native 320x512 source redrawn into the 24x24 canvas via translate(0.027 0) scale(0.046875), centered horizontally so the full suitcase height fits the icon.
